items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

This is a **management plane SDK migration tracking issue** for the `Azure.ResourceManager.Communication` package — migrating from Swagger/AutoRest-based generation to TypeSpec-based generation (MPG = Management Plane Generator).

It is a sub-issue of the parent tracking issue [#53864 - Azure Mgmt Generator migration](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864).

<details>
<summary>📋 Issue Context</summary>

- **Package**: `Azure.ResourceManager.Communication`
- **Location**: `sdk/communication/Azure.ResourceManager.Communication/`
- **CODEOWNERS**: `@ArcturusZhang`, `@ArthurMa1978`
- **Parent issue**: #53864 (Azure Mgmt Generator migration)
- **Issue type**: Internal engineering task (MPG migration)

</details>

<details>
<summary>✅ Suggested Sub-Tasks</summary>

- [ ] Set up TypeSpec spec for the Communication management-plane API (in `azure-rest-api-specs`)
- [ ] Configure `tsp-location.yaml` pointing to the TypeSpec source
- [ ] Run code generation via the Azure Mgmt Generator (`eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt`)
- [ ] Resolve any breaking changes (API compatibility) — check with `ApiCompatVersion` set to last GA version
- [ ] Apply any required SDK-side customizations (partial classes, `CodeGenSuppress`, `CodeGenType`, `@`@clientName`` decorators)
- [ ] Update public API listing: `pwsh eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 communication`
- [ ] Run and fix tests
- [ ] Update `CHANGELOG.md` with any breaking changes
- [ ] Update CI (`sdk/communication/ci.mgmt.yml`) if needed

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔗 Useful Resources</summary>

- [MPG migration skill / patterns](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/SKILL.md)
- [Mitigating breaking changes](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/SKILL.md)
- [AGENTS.md — management library build/test commands](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
- [Completed RP migrations tracker](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/55080)
- [CODEOWNERS — communication path](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/CODEOWNERS)

</details>

<details>
<summary>💡 Notes</summary>

- This is one of many MPG migration issues created in bulk; similar issues exist for other services (hdinsight, networkfunction, frontdoor, purview, etc.)
- The migration tooling is in `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt`
- After migration, run the `pre-commit-checks` skill before committing to ensure API listings and formatting are up-to-date

</details>
